Donal's Gauntlets of Mourning  
 

Lore Item
Slot: HANDS
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 16
Effect: Armor of Faith (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0) at Level 45
WT: 5.0 Size: SMALL
Class: CLR
Race: ALL except IKS VAH
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Donal's Gauntlets of Mourning
Lore Item
Slot: HANDS
Charges: Unlimited
AC: 16
Effect: Armor of Faith (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 10.0) at Level 45
WT: 5.0 Size: SMALL
Class: CLR
Race: ALL except IKS VAH
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Plate
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):70, 70, 84
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:460 pp 0 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:600
Submitted By:Dolganar Dethbane
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-09-11 09:40:28
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark
Average Price: No Data Pricing Data...
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 45
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Karnor's Castle
NPC Name
a construct
a cursed hand - Karnor's Castle


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Karnor's Castle


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
Too Lucky
QuoteReply
# Sep 16 2002 at 3:39 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591770532597
4 posts
Well, since theese Gauntlets are Very Rare, i must have been Very Lucky. I was just passing time, camping the Hand room with 2 friends. We only camped it for an hour or so, and then the Gauntlets droped. Neither of us were Clerics, so I ended up getting them. Well since I cant use them, they are up for sale for 5k. If anyone is interested, just give me a tell i am on the Xev server.

Sanctusrex
50th Monkey Boy
▲ Page top
Wedding Gift
QuoteReply
# May 05 2002 at 8:17 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252092257
5 posts
I recieved these as an EQ wedding gift from my maid-of-honor just yesterday. The only problem is I can't use the effect yet. Does anyone know what lvl the effect is usable? I was told it would be the same lvl as the spell effect it self (aka: lvl 39) but was hoping to get confirmation on this. =o) Thanks.

-Mihap Freeheart
24th Season Highelf Lady Cleric
Diamond Circle
Tribunal Server
▲ Page top
RE: Wedding Gift
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2002 at 5:05 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592251864034
10 posts
It's 45. Like all the class armour from Kunark.
▲ Page top
RE: Wedding Gift
QuoteReply
# May 05 2002 at 11:29 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592344474330
Sage
3,705 posts
No, it starts to work at either 45 or 46, forget which, but one of those two.
▲ Page top
Yay..free buffs...
QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2002 at 10:10 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591764536043
2 posts
Got these off a Construct which had been trained on us ( big surprise for KC ). Nice to have the free buff for myself and other casters in group, not to mention no mana waste when in Freeport area and tons of newbies asking for buffs. I also have the Donal's Vambraces, so the combination adds up to happy newbies. Shield of Words is still far superior AC, so tanks get it regardless. Anyways, my two cents )


Kasst Fasst ( cleric of the 51st season ) Veeshan server.
▲ Page top
I guess I'm lucky...
QuoteReply
# Jan 08 2002 at 7:05 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591754124041
133 posts
...a war guildy asked me to come to KC tonight...thier group needed a cleric. So I go and eventually we end up in the hand room after we had been at a couple other camps. We hadn't been in there long when these dropped...my group awarded them to me since I didn't already have a pair. I was very grateful...however, I won't be wearing them. Gaunts of the Black are better than these, by far. However...the effect on these is actually useful. (as opposed to the vambraces) If I'm in a group with no 'chanter/bard, then I use AoF on everyone except the main tank. However, I find I usually have plenty of mana to use Cleric SoW on all of the melees and the 'chanter if I have a clarity or mana song available. I still however only use AoF on myself, since I don't get hit much in a good group anyway. The casting time on these is around 8 seconds...though I haven't timed it exactly. These would be most useful in situations where no mana regen is available...and they may also save a spell slot. I'm very happy I got them, and I plan to hang onto them for quite some time. Btw...They do look very nice when worn...like dark blue plate. I would almost call it a midnight blue color. I'd love to have a full set, just to get a pic of it.

Esrevatem Dlareme
Mithril Warhammers
51st Cleric of Drinal
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 03 2002 at 6:23 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I am looking to buy these bad boys for about 5 k on bertoxx.

Effect
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2001 at 12:40 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247032656
224 posts
Armor of Faith
Increase Armor Class (AC) from 24 (L39) to 26 (L44)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: Clr (L39), Pal (L49)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Abjuration
Allowable Targets: All

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 100 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Mana Required: 150
Spell Duration: 630 ticks (63.0 minutes)
Duration Formula: 3
Casting Time: 6.0 seconds
Spell Recovery: 2.25 seconds

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: You feel the favor of the gods upon you.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso feels the favor of the gods upon them.
Spell fades: You no longer feel blessed.
▲ Page top
Donals Gaunts
QuoteReply
# Nov 13 2001 at 10:16 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591769136935
View User Forum
12 posts
In all the times I have camped this room looking for these to drop I have seen lots of druid stuff, 2 werewolf heads even, but not once have I seen this drop... it is rare indeed. Oh well my gaunts of the black are IMO just as good with only 1 less AC. The proc would be nice to have though since SoW is such a mana pig.
▲ Page top
RE: Donals Gaunts
QuoteReply
# Feb 25 2003 at 10:51 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592759167585
270 posts
BTW, it isn't a proc, it is a triggered effect.
▲ Page top
AoF over SoW
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2001 at 4:13 AM Rating: Decent
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
thing about shield of words is. it is only 6 more ac for 150 more mana. AoF is 150 mana, SoW is 300 mana. shield of words sucks. 150 extra mana is just too much for the extra ac, it is fine if you have a main warrior, and he is only one getting ac buff, but when you are in a group with 4 melee types that all want ac buffs, then go with armor of faith.

that is why i like these gaunts, free buffs are nice, especially when it is the buff i would be casting anyway.
▲ Page top
RE: AoF over SoW
QuoteReply
# Nov 08 2001 at 3:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758524915
12 posts
Shield of Words has been updated, its now adds close to an extra 30ac. Also when u get SoW (49)the mana cost is barely 10% of ur mana total. Making this spell far more usefull then AoF


Damicus Foehammer
50th Priest of Brell
Tallon Zek
▲ Page top
RE: AoF over SoW
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2001 at 4:15 AM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
something i wanted to add to my post above.

the ac isn't actually high enough for me to take gaunts of the black off for, though. gaunts of the black are 15ac and have some wis on them. the weight is an issue, too.

high elves are weak little monkeys.
▲ Page top
Whiner
QuoteReply
# Feb 21 2001 at 2:03 AM Rating: Default

View User Forum
Anonymous
Up until level 49 AoF is the best Ac buff Clerics can get these gauntlets proc at 45 and they don't use mana. Some people just whine too much.

#REDACTED, Posted: Feb 14 2001 at 1:04 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) could'nt they have made it with Shield of Words instead, it would have made them just abit more nicer then Armor of Faith... n00b buff tks
RE: sucks
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2001 at 11:43 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
these are AWESOME for downtime! free heals if someone doesn't have better on, I never put SoWords on myself, therefor never have to waste mana healing myself and other casters....

Correction.
QuoteReply
# Mar 10 2001 at 6:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247774963
21 posts
Umm, You can't heal with this, but you CAN give a quick AoF to a tank to hold them over til you got the mana for SoW. It's better than nothing for free mana.
